description: Design 1-click installation and configuration scripts (`agent-protocol-init`) for individual and team modes, updating adapter templates to point to the new Docs Center paths.
scope: Create/modify shell scripts (install.sh, setup.sh, bin/agent-protocol-init) to validate Node.js, initialize the MCP server (npm ci & build), and inject adapter templates (.cursorrules, etc.). Update adapters/*.tpl to point to 'documentation/AI_GUIDES/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md'. (Note: Generation of workflow/dispatch.json state is deferred or handled dynamically by the scripts at runtime, not as a static implementation artifact here).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to MCP Server logic (src/mcp-server/src/index.ts). NO removal of legacy Python scripts. NO refactoring of Markdown content outside of adapter templates. NO state/framework structural separation (M6).
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify MCP server source code.
Attempting to delete legacy Python scripts.
Executing without an approved M4 contract.
